word: G5220 - ὕπανδρος - hýpandros - hoop'-an-dros - Which hath an husband

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὕπανδρος

- Transliteration: Hupandros

- Phonetic: hoop'-an-dros

- Definition:

1. under i.e. subject to a man: married

- Origin: from G5259 and G435

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G5259 and G435; in subjection under a man that is a married woman: - which hath an husband.
